intended_use: Auto Segmentation is intended to be used as a workflow tool for initial anatomy segmentation of organs at risk on CT images as an aid in radiation therapy planning after user confirmation.
intended_use_full: Auto Segmentation is intended to be used as a workflow tool for initial anatomy segmentation of organs at risk on CT images as an aid in radiation therapy planning after user confirmation.
target_condition: Radiation therapy planning requiring organ at risk delineation
ground_truth: Manual annotations by three independent qualified radiotherapy practitioners following RTOG and DAHANCA clinical guidelines
other_metrics: DICE similarity coefficient (DSC) reported for 40 organs/organ subregions; for example: Body 99.50% (Lower CI95: 99.38%), Lung Left 97.70% (97.38%), Liver 94.28% (92.27%), Bladder 81.50% (78.33%), Brainstem 87.69% (87.15%)
